# Intent (intentrev.net)

> Contractor lead generation and revenue systems for HVAC, plumbing, roofing, and home services. Florida and nationwide.

## Summary

Intent helps trades businesses engineer revenue through lead generation: speed-to-lead response, voice qualification, programmatic local SEO, and conversion-focused web experiences. We focus on measurable outcomes—leads and revenue—not vanity metrics.

## Contact

Website: https://intentrev.net
